overview_summary: All four neighboring landowners have no documented public stance on development, as none were found voicing opinions in local records. Their community influence appears limited, with no high-profile positions or outspoken roles among them, suggesting minimal immediate opposition or support from these specific neighbors.

neighbors.name: Robert H. Bangle & Pamela J. Bangle
neighbors.claims: Robert and Pamela Bangle own rural property in Cochise County but have kept a low public profile ([citizenportal.ai](https://citizenportal.ai/articles/6624621/Cochise-County/Arizona/Mixed-public-reaction-at-Cochise-County-meeting-over-jail-district-settlement-and-funding#:~:text=%E2%9C%93)). No references to the Bangle family appear in local news or county meeting archives through 2025, indicating they have not taken public positions on development issues ([citizenportal.ai](https://citizenportal.ai/articles/6624621/Cochise-County/Arizona/Mixed-public-reaction-at-Cochise-County-meeting-over-jail-district-settlement-and-funding#:~:text=CitizenPortal.ai%20,AI%20makes%20mistakes%2C%20so%20for)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage the Bangles with informal, face-to-face outreach emphasizing respect for farmland and how project plans protect their agricultural interests.

neighbors.name: Anton Tyler & Susan Tyler
neighbors.claims: Anton and Susan Tyler are listed as landowners in Cochise County with no known civic appointments or public statements ([citizenportal.ai](https://citizenportal.ai/articles/6624621/Cochise-County/Arizona/Mixed-public-reaction-at-Cochise-County-meeting-over-jail-district-settlement-and-funding#:~:text=CitizenPortal.ai%20,AI%20makes%20mistakes%2C%20so%20for)). A search of county records and local media did not find the Tylers participating in any development-related meetings or petitions as of 2025 ([citizenportal.ai](https://citizenportal.ai/articles/6624621/Cochise-County/Arizona/Mixed-public-reaction-at-Cochise-County-meeting-over-jail-district-settlement-and-funding#:~:text=CitizenPortal.ai%20,AI%20makes%20mistakes%2C%20so%20for)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Approach the Tylers through a community acquaintance or neighborly visit, focusing on maintaining the quiet rural character and addressing any privacy or noise concerns.

neighbors.name: James P. Douglass
neighbors.claims: James P. Douglass is a local contractor in Cochise County; he held an Arizona specialty contractor license (now listed as inactive) based in Sierra Vista ([www.buildzoom.com](https://www.buildzoom.com/contractor/james-patrick-douglass#:~:text=Although%20the%20State%20of%20Arizona,to%20hire%20licensed%20contractors%20for)) ([www.buildzoom.com](https://www.buildzoom.com/contractor/james-patrick-douglass#:~:text=James%20Patrick%20Douglass%20currently%20holds,Inactive%20when%20we%20last%20checked)). There is no indication that Douglass has spoken publicly about development projects, and his name does not appear in county meeting transcripts available online ([citizenportal.ai](https://citizenportal.ai/articles/6624621/Cochise-County/Arizona/Mixed-public-reaction-at-Cochise-County-meeting-over-jail-district-settlement-and-funding#:~:text=CitizenPortal.ai%20,AI%20makes%20mistakes%2C%20so%20for)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Highlight local job creation and contracting opportunities when meeting with Douglass, as his background in construction suggests he may respond positively to fair local hiring and business involvement.

neighbors.name: Virginia Fleming
neighbors.claims: Virginia Fleming owns property in rural Cochise County and has not been identified in any public-facing civic roles or commentary on development ([citizenportal.ai](https://citizenportal.ai/articles/6624621/Cochise-County/Arizona/Mixed-public-reaction-at-Cochise-County-meeting-over-jail-district-settlement-and-funding#:~:text=CitizenPortal.ai%20,AI%20makes%20mistakes%2C%20so%20for)). approach_recommendations.engage: Reach out to Fleming through a polite introduction and provide visual examples or site plans, addressing how the project will preserve scenic views and local aesthetics important to her.
